response:
Sec. 1  
peanuts are a type of food that contains proteins which can trigger an allergic reaction in some individuals  
the body of a person who is allergic to peanuts cannot survive underwater because the pressure outside the body is much higher than the pressure inside the body  
the human body is not designed to handle the extreme pressure of water and the lungs can't function properly in such conditions  

Sec. 2  
the lungs of a person who is allergic to peanuts are not adapted to the changes in pressure that occur when moving underwater  
this makes it impossible for them to live underwater without experiencing severe health complications or even death
